'''鈭歞h-ch-w''' ('''kadhachaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mythise|mythise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mythise|mythise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-ch-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadhachaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhachaw|thidhachaw]] || [[word:jidhachaw|jidhachaw]] || [[word:shidhachaw|shidhachaw]] || [[word:kidhachaw|kidhachaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhachaw|thuthudhachaw]] || [[word:jujudhachaw|jujudhachaw]] || [[word:shushudhachaw|shushudhachaw]] || [[word:kukudhachaw|kukudhachaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhachaw|thudhachaw]] || [[word:judhachaw|judhachaw]] || [[word:shudhachaw|shudhachaw]] || [[word:kudhachaw|kudhachaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhachaw|thudhachaw]] || [[word:judhachaw|judhachaw]] || [[word:shudhachaw|shudhachaw]] || [[word:kudhachaw|kudhachaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhachaw|thedhachaw]] || [[word:jedhachaw|jedhachaw]] || [[word:shedhachaw|shedhachaw]] || [[word:kedhachaw|kedhachaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhachaw|thothodhachaw]] || [[word:jojodhachaw|jojodhachaw]] || [[word:shoshodhachaw|shoshodhachaw]] || [[word:kokodhachaw|kokodhachaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachaw|thodhachaw]] || [[word:jodhachaw|jodhachaw]] || [[word:shodhachaw|shodhachaw]] || [[word:kodhachaw|kodhachaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachaw|thodhachaw]] || [[word:jodhachaw|jodhachaw]] || [[word:shodhachaw|shodhachaw]] || [[word:kodhachaw|kodhachaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]] || [[word:dhachaw|dhachaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhachaw|th忙dhachaw]] || [[word:j忙dhachaw|j忙dhachaw]] || [[word:sh忙dhachaw|sh忙dhachaw]] || [[word:k忙dhachaw|k忙dhachaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhachaw|thathadhachaw]] || [[word:jajadhachaw|jajadhachaw]] || [[word:shashadhachaw|shashadhachaw]] || [[word:kakadhachaw|kakadhachaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhachaw|thadhachaw]] || [[word:jadhachaw|jadhachaw]] || [[word:shadhachaw|shadhachaw]] || [[word:kadhachaw|kadhachaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhachaw|thadhachaw]] || [[word:jadhachaw|jadhachaw]] || [[word:shadhachaw|shadhachaw]] || [[word:kadhachaw|kadhachaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhachaw|shadhachaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhachaw|goshadhachaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhachaw|gokishadhachaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhachawn眉|shadhachawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkn眉|goshadhachawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachawn眉|gokishadhachawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhachawsh毛|shadhachawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhachawnksh毛|goshadhachawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhachawsh毛|gokishadhachawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachawro|shadhachawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkro|goshadhachawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachawro|gokishadhachawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachawmu|shadhachawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkmu|goshadhachawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachawmu|gokishadhachawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhachawsher|shadhachawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhachawnksher|goshadhachawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhachawsher|gokishadhachawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhachawng|shadhachawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkng|goshadhachawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhachawng|gokishadhachawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhachawya|shadhachawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkya|goshadhachawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhachawya|gokishadhachawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhachawyam|shadhachawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkyam|goshadhachawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhachawyam|gokishadhachawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachawn眉sh毛|shadhachawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkn眉sh毛|goshadhachawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachawn眉sh毛|gokishadhachawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachawn眉ro|shadhachawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkn眉ro|goshadhachawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachawn眉ro|gokishadhachawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachawn眉mu|shadhachawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkn眉mu|goshadhachawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachawn眉mu|gokishadhachawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachawsh毛n眉|shadhachawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachawnksh毛n眉|goshadhachawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachawsh毛n眉|gokishadhachawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachawsh毛ro|shadhachawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachawnksh毛ro|goshadhachawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachawsh毛ro|gokishadhachawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachawsh毛mu|shadhachawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachawnksh毛mu|goshadhachawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachawsh毛mu|gokishadhachawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachawron眉|shadhachawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkron眉|goshadhachawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachawron眉|gokishadhachawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachawrosh毛|shadhachawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkrosh毛|goshadhachawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachawrosh毛|gokishadhachawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachawromu|shadhachawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkromu|goshadhachawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachawromu|gokishadhachawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachawmun眉|shadhachawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkmun眉|goshadhachawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachawmun眉|gokishadhachawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachawmush毛|shadhachawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkmush毛|goshadhachawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachawmush毛|gokishadhachawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachawmuro|shadhachawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachawnkmuro|goshadhachawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachawmuro|gokishadhachawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
